description: Displays multiline paragraph text in a bounded box. For explanatory text, descriptions, and multi-sentence content. Content can be a string literal or a reference to an existing variable. Content is in PLAIN TEXT mode by default — text renders as-is without math processing. Math expressions must be wrapped in math() to render as math. Supports text color, background color, opacity, padding, line height, and border styling.
utility: Display explanatory text and multi-sentence descriptions — use instead of multiple write() calls for non-math content

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Top-left corner position of paragraph box

arguments.name: width
arguments.description: Width of paragraph box in grid units

arguments.name: height
arguments.description: Height of paragraph box in grid units

arguments.name: paraVarName
arguments.description: Reference to an existing variable, or a string literal

alternates.syntax: paragraph(at(row, col), width, height, paraVarName, c(blue))
paragraph(at(row, col), width, height, paraVarName, c(blue), fc(yellow))
paragraph(at(row, col), width, height, paraVarName, c(black), fc(lightgray), fs(18), pd(10), lh(1.5))
alternates.description: Complete styling: colors, font size, padding, line height

examples.scenario: Question paragraph with slidedown and notes for circle lesson
Explanation paragraph with teal text and honeydew fill (axis intercepts lesson)
Problem statement paragraph with slidedown effect (Point and Circle lesson)
examples.expression: paragraph_1=paragraph(at(5,4),45.9,2.8,para_str_1,ff("Gill Sans"),effect(slidedown),notes("Position of a Point and a Circle"))

examples.scenario: Overview paragraph with lavender fill and padding (Point and Circle lesson)
Blue annotation paragraph with slideright effect (circle from diameter lesson)
